Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Yan 7-Network 200-Parcel Atlas

Source: R/data.R
yan7_200.Rd

Brain atlas for the Yan et al. (2023) homotopic cortical parcellation with 200 parcels aligned to 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

yan7_200()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Yan X, et al. (2023). "Homotopic local-global parcellation of the human cerebral cortex from resting-state functional connectivity." NeuroImage, 273:120010. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Other cortical_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Examples

yan7_200()
#> 
#> ── yan7_200 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 200
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 200 × 3
#>     hemi  region                           label                              
#>     <chr> <chr>                            <chr>                              
#>   1 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_1       lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_1      
#>   2 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_2       lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_2      
#>   3 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_3       lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_3      
#>   4 left  7networks_LH_Default_IPL_4       lh_7networks_LH_Default_IPL_4      
#>   5 left  7networks_LH_Default_PCC_1       lh_7networks_LH_Default_PCC_1      
#>   6 left  7networks_LH_Default_PCC_2       lh_7networks_LH_Default_PCC_2      
#>   7 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_1     
#>   8 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_2     
#>   9 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_3      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_3     
#>  10 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_4      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_4     
#>  11 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_5      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCd_5     
#>  12 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCl_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCl_1     
#>  13 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCl_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCl_2     
#>  14 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_1     
#>  15 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_2     
#>  16 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_3      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_3     
#>  17 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_4      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCm_4     
#>  18 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_1     
#>  19 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_2     
#>  20 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_3      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_3     
#>  21 left  7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_4      lh_7networks_LH_Default_PFCv_4     
#>  22 left  7networks_LH_Default_RSC         lh_7networks_LH_Default_RSC        
#>  23 left  7networks_LH_Default_TempPole    lh_7networks_LH_Default_TempPole   
#>  24 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_1     
#>  25 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_2     
#>  26 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_3      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_3     
#>  27 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_4      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_4     
#>  28 left  7networks_LH_Default_Temp_5      lh_7networks_LH_Default_Temp_5     
#>  29 left  7networks_LH_Default_pCun_1      lh_7networks_LH_Default_pCun_1     
#>  30 left  7networks_LH_Default_pCun_2      lh_7networks_LH_Default_pCun_2     
#>  31 left  7networks_LH_Cont_FPole          lh_7networks_LH_Cont_FPole         
#>  32 left  7networks_LH_Cont_FrMed          lh_7networks_LH_Cont_FrMed         
#>  33 left  7networks_LH_Cont_IPL_1          lh_7networks_LH_Cont_IPL_1         
#>  34 left  7networks_LH_Cont_IPS_1          lh_7networks_LH_Cont_IPS_1         
#>  35 left  7networks_LH_Cont_IPS_2          lh_7networks_LH_Cont_IPS_2         
#>  36 left  7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl_1         lh_7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl_1        
#>  37 left  7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl_2         lh_7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl_2        
#>  38 left  7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl_3         lh_7networks_LH_Cont_PFCl_3        
#>  39 left  7networks_LH_Cont_Temp           lh_7networks_LH_Cont_Temp          
#>  40 left  7networks_LH_Cont_pCun_1         lh_7networks_LH_Cont_pCun_1        
#>  41 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_FPole        lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_FPole       
#>  42 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_OFC_1        lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_OFC_1       
#>  43 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_OFC_2        lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_OFC_2       
#>  44 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_Temp         lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_Temp        
#>  45 left  7networks_LH_Limbic_TempPole     lh_7networks_LH_Limbic_TempPole    
#>  46 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed_1 lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed_1
#>  47 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed_2 lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed_2
#>  48 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed_3 lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_FrMed_3
#>  49 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_IPL     lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_IPL    
#>  50 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_1   lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_1  
#>  51 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_2   lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Ins_2  
#>  52 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_PrCv    lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_PrCv   
#>  53 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_SPL     lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_SPL    
#>  54 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_ST      lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_ST     
#>  55 left  7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Temp_1  lh_7networks_LH_SalVentAttn_Temp_1 
#>  56 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_IPS_1      lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_IPS_1     
#>  57 left  7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PFCd       lh_7networks_LH_DorsAttn_PFCd

plot(yan7_200())

On this page

Part of the ggsegverse — Gross Geometry Brain Segmentation Universe
Built with pkgdown
